title: Irish Placid Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Irish-inspired stew made with tender placid, flavorful irish, and rich tomato sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add chopped irish and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add diced tomato, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add placid, water, and flour. Stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
